publications.title: Smart Water Monitoring System for Agriculture
publications.journal: International Journal of New Technology and Research
publications.associated_with: SDM College of Engineering and Technology
publications.description_raw: Agriculture is considered as the main source of food and raw materials. In India many farmers are still using the traditional methods for agricultural field. These traditional methods can be replaced using the current technology. This project describes us how irrigation system can be handled by IOT. It helps in saving and conserving the water by automatically providing the water to the plant according to their respective water requirement. The growing demand for food in terms of high quality has increased for the industrialization in the agriculture field. Internet of things(IOT) is high performance technology it is offering solutions and innovation to the agriculture field. The main objective of this project is to Help the farmers using IOT technology.
problem_statement: Traditional agricultural irrigation methods are inefficient
Lack of automation in water distribution
Water wastage due to manual irrigation
Increasing demand for high-quality agricultural output
solution: Automated water distribution based on plant requirements
Used sensor-driven decision making for irrigation
Enabled efficient and optimized water usage
core_contributions: Demonstrated application of IoT in agriculture
Proposed automated irrigation system using sensor data
Bridged gap between traditional farming and modern technology
